jd_text: We are supporting a confidential advanced engineering programme , and are looking for a Program Manager (UAE National) to help drive delivery. This is a unique opportunity to be part of a first-of-its-kind development programme in the region , working at the intersection of engineering, certification, testing and industrialisation . The role: Support and drive elements of the end-to-end development programme Coordinate across engineering, testing, manufacturing and external partners Contribute to program planning, governance, risk management and delivery milestones Work closely with senior leadership and technical teams Manage cross-functional engineering, manufacturing and test teams Own schedule, budget, milestones and risk management Establish and drive program governance, reporting and decision-making frameworks Interface with regulators, suppliers, partners and customers Support testing, certification and operational readiness We are open on background , and welcome candidates from: Aerospace / Defence Space programmes Complex engineering or industrial projects Energy / large-scale technical programmes The key requirement is experience delivering complex, multi-disciplinary technical programmes in a regulated or high-performance environment . We're also looking for individuals with an Engineering degree (Aerospace, Mechanical, Electrical or similar), and 7+ years’ experience in aerospace or complex hardware programmes. Finally, to succeed here you will need a hands-on, delivery-focused mindset and to feel comfortable in fast-paced environments. PMP or equivalent (preferred).
